mapper.sql: id , medicine_id, batch_no, quantity, expiry_date, warehouse, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
select stock.id as id, stock.medicine_id as medicine_id, stock.batch_no as batch_no, stock.quantity as quantity, stock.expiry_date as expiry_date, stock.warehouse as warehouse, stock.create_time as create_time, stock.update_time as update_time, medicine.id as med_id, medicine.category_id as med_category_id, medicine.name as med_name, medicine.generic_name as med_generic_name, medicine.approval_number as med_approval_number, medicine.specification as med_specification, medicine.supplier_id as med_supplier_id, medicine.prescription as med_prescription, medicine.status as med_status, medicine.description as med_description, medicine.create_time as med_create_time, medicine.update_time as med_update_time from medicine_stock stock join medicine on stock.medicine_id = medicine.id
AND stock.medicine_id = #{request.medicineId}
AND medicine.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.medicineName}, '%')
AND stock.batch_no = #{request.batchNo}
AND stock.warehouse = #{request.warehouse}
AND stock.expiry_date < NOW()
AND stock.expiry_date >= NOW()
AND stock.quantity < 50
AND stock.quantity >= 50 AND stock.quantity <= 200
AND stock.quantity > 200
ORDER BY stock.create_time DESC

select stock.id as id, stock.medicine_id as medicine_id, stock.batch_no as batch_no, stock.quantity as quantity, stock.expiry_date as expiry_date, stock.warehouse as warehouse, stock.create_time as create_time, stock.update_time as update_time, medicine.id as med_id, medicine.category_id as med_category_id, medicine.name as med_name, medicine.generic_name as med_generic_name, medicine.approval_number as med_approval_number, medicine.specification as med_specification, medicine.supplier_id as med_supplier_id, medicine.prescription as med_prescription, medicine.status as med_status, medicine.description as med_description, medicine.create_time as med_create_time, medicine.update_time as med_update_time from medicine_stock stock join medicine on stock.medicine_id = medicine.id where stock.id = #{id}
